title: Bear Traps
description: Adds Bear Traps to the game, they can be used to damage mobs that step on them and keep them in place
body:
**This datapack/mod adds bear traps**

Bear Traps can be crafted 
in the crafting table with three iron ingots and a stone button

![Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/62b9fbd162fd3a274062fe8f3fae7e449d2b08f6.png)

**They can be placed down and any mob that walks on them, including the player, will be damaged and stuck in place. The only way for a mob to escape is for the trap to be broken.**

**After a Bear Trap is used it will become closed, to open it and make it usable again a player must press the button at the center of the trap**

![Bear Traps](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/14d982b80fe4e9b9f8850eee292403784c16f150.png)

**Throwing a Redstone Block on the traps will upgrade them into an Upgraded Bear Trap. They work the same as normal ones but only Hostile Mobs will be damaged by walking on them**

![Bear Trap Items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fad0468170eef5880e326168ab2b0840bff86716.png)
